top_signals.title: Chip Stocks Tumble on AI Anxiety as Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in chipmakers dragged down the stock market on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations after a breakneck surge from war-driven lows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: United States revokes license that authorized Iranian oil sales - Reuters
top_signals.summary: United States revokes license that authorized Iranian oil sales  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon raising at least $25 billion in bond sale, won't issue more debt in 2026
top_signals.summary: It marks Amazon's latest debt raise as it looks to buttress its massive investments in artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: DOF Group Wins Contract Award in APAC Region
top_signals.summary: DOF Group ASA announced a large contract award for Subsea Construction and Pre Commissioning Support services in the APAC Region.Skandi Inventor will be deployed for the execution of the offshore operations scheduled to commence in Q4 2026 in…

top_signals.title: Kraken wins $22M arbitration against former auditor Mazars
top_signals.summary: The crypto exchange's parent company says Mazars' withdrawal from its 2022 audit caused millions in damages and tied the dispute to Operation Chokepoint 2.0.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: TKMS Selected as Preferred Supplier for Canadian Patrol Submarine Project
top_signals.summary: TKMS welcomed the Government of Canada's decision to select Team 212CD as the Preferred Supplier for the Canadian Patrol Submarine Project (CPSP), delivering twelve 212CD submarines. The announcement marks a new chapter in defense cooperation between Canada…
